mapper.sql: id, project_id, input_url, final_url, device_preset, CAST(viewport_jsonb AS TEXT) AS viewport_jsonb, status, CAST(summary_jsonb AS TEXT) AS summary_jsonb, created_by, idempotency_key, started_at, finished_at, failure_code, failure_message, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM site_discovery WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE site_discovery SET status = 'RUNNING', started_at = COALESCE(started_at, #{startedAt}), updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'QUEUED' AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE site_discovery SET status = 'COMPLETED', final_url = #{finalUrl}, summary_jsonb = CAST(#{summaryJsonb} AS jsonb), finished_at = #{finishedAt}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('QUEUED', 'RUNNING') AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE site_discovery SET status = 'FAILED', failure_code = #{failureCode}, failure_message = #{failureMessage}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('QUEUED', 'RUNNING') AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE site_discovery SET status = 'FAILED', failure_code = #{failureCode}, failure_message = #{failureMessage}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'QUEUED' AND deleted_at IS NULL
